allow: Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const data=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const list=Array.isArray\(data\)?data:data.data||data.logs||[]; list.forEach\(l=>console.log\(JSON.stringify\({status:l.status,message:l.message,error:l.error_message,links:l.tracking_links_synced,accounts:l.accounts_synced,triggered:l.triggered_by,started:l.started_at}\)\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const API_BASE='https://app.onlyfansapi.com/api'; const nextPage='https://app.onlyfansapi.com/api/acct_1a8303b5bf3d48a9a1dd4042c18b8ab5/tracking-links?limit=50&offset=50'; const p=new URL\(nextPage\); const url=p.pathname+p.search; console.log\('url:',url\); console.log\('full:',API_BASE+url\);")

PowerShell($body = '{"triggered_by":"manual"}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://upbeat-bravery-production-3ec1.up.railway.app/sync/orchestrate" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 300; $lines = $r.Content -split "`n"; $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '"step"' } | ForEach-Object { $_ } | Select-Object -Last 10)
